library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Late letter in Hebrew from Yosef b. Emmanuel Ergas in Livorno to Abram Segre. Dated 3 Adar 5489 AM which is 1729 CE. The address is found in the next shelfmark, listing Casale as the destination– which could refer to several different locations in Italy: Casale Monferrato, Casale Marittimo, and others. Needs examination.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Italian מ-Livorno. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
